raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"organization","confidence":0.62,"matched_text":"The local tourism board might not have information about local classes or workshops, as their primary focus is on promoting tourism and events in the area.","distilled_fact":"The local tourism board's primary focus is on promoting tourism and events in the area."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"organization","confidence":0.6,"matched_text":"However, they might be able to point you in the right direction or provide recommendations on who to contact for that information.","distilled_fact":"The local tourism board might be able to point the user in the right direction or provide recommendations on who to contact for information about local classes or workshops."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"person","confidence":0.64,"matched_text":"you can also ask other artisans or crafters in your network, like Rachel the jewelry maker, if they know of any good classes or workshops in the area.","distilled_fact":"Rachel the jewelry maker is in the user's network."}]}
